title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy
description: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Learners cumulatively produce a valid focused agent skill through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
